//: ignoreDeprecations: tsup's dts build (rollup-plugin-dts) injects `baseUrl: "."`, which TypeScript 6.0.3 flags as a 7.0-removal deprecation (TS5101). Acknowledge it so the bundled `.d.ts` emit succeeds (#77).
//paths: Type-level twin of the vitest alias: the published cli `.d.ts` inlines its own copy of @getreceipt/core's types (#77), so cli-via-dist loses nominal identity with the standalone @getreceipt/core the tests import directly. Resolve @getreceipt/cli to SOURCE for typecheck (as vitest does for runtime) so the integration tests check one shared type graph; the published bundled `.d.ts` is covered by the e2e suite.
